title: xyris fuliginea
intro: Xyris fuliginea, also known as the Ashy Yellow-eyed Grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Xyris fuliginea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit potential antiviral properties. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves and flowers of the plant.
